openapoc_modinfo.name: Crashing Vehicles
openapoc_modinfo.author: OpenApoc team
openapoc_modinfo.description: Non-UFO vehicles (X-COM craft, civilian traffic, road vehicles) no longer vanish when destroyed - they crash-land when their HP drops below roughly 1/7 of their maximum, the same way UFOs already do. Weapons and modules may be lost in the crash.
